QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_7

question.text: How many Central Record-keeping Agencies (CRAs) currently operate in the NPS ecosystem?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Three CRAs operate in the NPS ecosystem: Protean eGov Technologies (formerly NSDL e-Gov), KFin Technologies, and CAMS. **The Trap:** Older study materials mention only one CRA (Protean/NSDL). The system has since expanded to three CRAs. **Cross-Exam Context:** CRAs maintain subscriber records, issue PRANs, and provide account maintenance, similar to RTAs in mutual funds. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Guide clients to check their Statement of Transaction (SOT) issued by the CRA within 2 months of the financial year end.
